name: Breadcrumb
description: Navigation trail composed of BreadcrumbItem links, joined by a divider (arrow/slash/dot). The last item renders as the non-interactive current page.

items.type: Array<{ label: string; icon?: string; href?: string; onClick?: () => void }>
items.description: Ordered list of crumbs — the last item is automatically rendered as the current page (no link)
